HasteUp20PercentAir.name: Quicken Storm
HasteUp20PercentAir.description: Storm allies have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20% when they enter the battlefield at the start of battle or from reinforcements. This will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.
HasteUp20PercentAir.affected: Storm allies have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20% when they enter the battlefield at the start of battle or from reinforcements. This will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Recovery Mist
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: For another {0}TU, this unit will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Unleashed
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 1% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Absolute Zero
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Absolute Zero
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has 10% or less of max HP, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Overclock
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 25% of max HP at the end of each turn, cannot fall asleep, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dual Heaven Style
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
The user is granted a Sleep Ward, Stun Ward, Poison Ward, will enter Dual Heaven Stance for 200TU and Endure the next damage that would defeat it with 1HP. While in Dual Heaven Stance, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

This skill becomes locked for 200TU after use. Usable if this unit has not defeated any units with attacks or Absolute Zero while on the battlefield. Each Ward prevents their named effect from being applied once, then is removed. Identical Wards and Endure effects cannot stack.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dual Heaven Stance
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: For another {0}TU, this unit heals for 50% of max HP at the end of each turn, and this unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x. This attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Recovery Mist
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: For another {0}TU, this unit will heal for 5% of their max HP and have a 30% chance to be Purified after every turn.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dragon Fire
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
Enrages 2 allies and grants them the burn status effect. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dragon Breath
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
Enrages 2 allies, grants them the burn status effect, and heals them for 100% of max HP. Unlocked each time the user damages an enemy with an attack. This skill is locked again after each use or if the user leaves the battlefield.

This will overwrite the effects of previous Enrage skills. Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Elemental Shield
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit cannot be defeated if it has not taken attack damage from Earth, Fire, Water and Storm units.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Elemental Shield
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit cannot be defeated if it has not taken attack damage from Earth, Fire, Water and Storm units.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Kirin's Strength
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks if this unit has 50%+ of max HP, or if any enemy unit has 100TU or more.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Go Fast
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: All allies will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 50%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Intense Burn
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: All allies that have the Burn status effect will have the TU costs for all of their skills reduced by 20%, and until the end of their next turn their Attack is increased to 1.5x. This will overwrite the effects of other Quicken and Enrage skills.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Healing Quicken
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: The user is healed for 30% of max HP and TU costs for all of their skills are reduced by 30% until the end of their next turn. This will overwrite the effect of previous Quicken skills.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dreams Entwined
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever a Dark ally named Aigis enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If there is not already a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit adds Aigis to next in line of allied reinforcements at the end of the turn whenever:
- Another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, so long as this unit is not defeated or sacrificed at the same time.
- This unit defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack.

Aigis's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be stunned if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dreams Entwined
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect can trigger only once each time this unit enters the battlefield, and is considered a Hold Ground+ effect. Whenever a Dark ally named Aigis enters the battlefield from allied reinforcements, this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

If there is not already a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit adds Aigis to next in line of allied reinforcements at the end of the turn whenever:
- Another non-conjured ally on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, so long as this unit is not defeated or sacrificed at the same time.
- This unit defeats a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield with an attack.

Aigis's Level, Limit Breaks, Awakenings, Boosts, Potential, Mastery, Weapon and Accessory will match this unit.

This unit cannot fall asleep or be stunned if there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements.

This unit has 30% damage reduction from attacks. While there is a Dark ally named Aigis on the battlefield or in allied reinforcements, this unit has 60% damage reduction instead.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Spirit Trick
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy, and allies gain Spirit equal to the number of units that are sleeping or have slept while on the battlefield after this attack.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dark Cycle
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random ally on the battlefield is healed for 1% of max HP.
- A random ally on the battlefield is Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects.
- A random ally on the battlefield will have its TU costs for all of its skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Dark Divinity
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
If this unit would be defeated by an enemy attack or a status effect while having more than 1 HP, it instead survives with 1 HP.

While there is a poisoned enemy on the battlefield, this unit is not affected by stun effects.

This unit enters battle with a Poison Ward, Sleep Ward, and Stun Ward.

At the end of each of this unit's turns:
- A random ally on the battlefield is healed for 30% of max HP.
- A random ally on the battlefield is Enraged. This will overwrite any existing Weak or Enrage effects.
- A random ally on the battlefield will have its TU costs for all of its skills reduced by 20%. This will overwrite the effect of previous quicken skills.

Enraged units have their Attack increased to 1.5x until the end of their next turn.
<color=#00edf6>Storm Bane:</color> {0}% Attack increase against Storm units

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Shadow Entry
rejectedPassiveSamples.description: This unit gains the Stealth status effect. All other allies also gain stealth if another ally already has stealth. Triggered when this unit enters the battlefield from reinforcements. Stealthed units ignore the next enemy attack that would damage more than 1 target. Any damage will remove stealth.

rejectedPassiveSamples.name: Draconic Strength
rejectedPassiveSamples.description:
Grants all allies Piercing, and Intense Rage. A unit with Piercing will have their Attacks ignore enemy damage reduction effects until the end of their next turn. Intense Rage increases a units Attack to 1.5x for their next 3 turns, and will overwrite existing Weak or Enrage effects. It cannot be overwritten by other Enrage effects but can be overwritten by Weak effects.

All allies that are Fire element or have a Burn Blast or Burn Drive type active skill are granted the Burn status effect. Then the user is granted the Healing Burn status effect for 300TU.

Locked for 150TU after the user has entered the battlefield, and locks again for 150TU after each use.

A unit with Healing Burn will heal after each turn at the same rate as Burn would deal damage instead of taking damage from Burn. Healing Burn will overwrite other status effects on the user and can replace the Burn status effect, but cannot be replaced by Burn. Any unit that deals damage to or is dealt damage by a unit with Healing Burn will gain the Burn status effect. Healing Burn will not be removed by Purify skills.

excluded: mechanic buffs not referenced by character leaderBuff
